package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_ticker_not_stopped_on_exit: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag time.Ticker creation without a visible Stop path in services or workers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario543Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
